[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000100000 1
1 0000000100 1
2 1000000001 2
3 0000010100 2
4 0000000110 2
5 1100000101 4
6 1000100100 3
7 1000000000 1

01 10 0000000001 1
12 21 1000100000 2
23 32 1000000000 1 match 7

56 65 0001000100 2
67 76 1000000100 2
70 07 0000010100 2 match 3

13 31 1000000001 2 match 2

35 53 0000000000 a
46 64 0100000100 2

71 17 1000000000 1 match 7
